title: 1.1: Organizes all 4 protocol-specific implementation files (cloud_easyjson.go, data.go, metrics_client.go, output.go) into a versioned v1/ subpackage under output/cloud/
1.2: Exports a constructor function New in output/cloud/v1/output.go that accepts logger, config, and API client and returns a v1 Output
1.3: Implements a SetReferenceID method on the v1 Output struct in output/cloud/v1/output.go that stores the reference ID for the cloud test run
1.4: Implements a Start method on the v1 Output struct in output/cloud/v1/output.go that initializes background goroutines for aggregating and flushing metric samples
1.5: Implements a StopWithTestError method on the v1 Output struct in output/cloud/v1/output.go that gracefully stops aggregation and metric emission
1.6: Implements a SetTestRunStopCallback method on the v1 Output struct in output/cloud/v1/output.go that receives the engine stop function
1.7: Implements an AddMetricSamples method on the v1 Output struct in output/cloud/v1/output.go that receives metric samples and buffers them for asynchronous processing

1.8: Moves all 9 aggregation-related symbols (startBackgroundProcesses, AddMetricSamples, aggregateHTTPTrails, flushHTTPTrails, shouldStopSendingMetrics, pushMetrics, ceilDiv, pushJob, expectedGzipRatio) from output/cloud/output.go into the versioned subpackage
1.9: Moves the MetricsClient from output/cloud/ to the versioned subpackage
1.10: Moves all 4 data format types (Sample, SampleDataSingle, SampleDataMap, SampleDataAggregatedHTTPReqs) from output/cloud/ to the versioned subpackage
1.11: Creates a v1 Output instance from the main output/cloud/output.go during startup to delegate metrics work to the versioned subpackage
1.12: Retains all 3 test lifecycle responsibilities (test creation, threshold handling, test finalization) in the main output/cloud/output.go Output struct
1.13: Declares package cloud in all 4 v1 subpackage source files (v1/output.go, v1/cloud_easyjson.go, v1/data.go, v1/metrics_client.go) instead of package v1
4.1: Modifies any of the 6 existing public method signatures (Start, Stop, StopWithTestError, Description, SetThresholds, SetTestRunStopCallback) on the main Output struct in output/cloud/output.go

4.2: Deletes any of the 4 test files (output/cloud/output_test.go, output/cloud/v1/bench_test.go, output/cloud/v1/data_test.go, output/cloud/v1/output_test.go) without relocating them to the versioned subpackage
